name: ed
description: Edit, view, or open a file from a cmux-hosted Claude Code session. /ed:edit opens the editor plus a hot-reload viewer pane (entr-wrapped automatically) when a viewer is configured for the file type. /ed:view opens a single terminal viewer pane with editor-read-only fallback. /ed:open hands the file to the OS default application (Preview, Keynote, etc.) — no terminal surface. Per-extension config at ~/.config/ed/config.toml.
